title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: May 31, 2024
summary: May 31, 2024: The sea ice has continued to decrease this week at a lower rate of 2.53% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 3.21%), from the level on 05/23/2024 of 12.411 M km 2 to 12.097 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s...

title: Leading Collaborative Conservation Initiatives
summary: Alaska Conservation Foundation protects Alaska’s public lands and waters and builds resilience to climate change by supporting grassroots advocacy and leading collaborative statewide climate change adaptation efforts.
